title: thelypteris tenggerensis
intro: Thelypteris tenggerensis, also known as the Tenggeris fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris tenggerensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies in the form of poultices and salves.
